headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on Dollar Tree, Lowers Price Target to $107
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Scot Ciccarelli   maintains Dollar Tree (NASDAQ:DLTR) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $142 to $107.
